framing: Senior RF engineer at Ericsson applying to 5G startup in Japan

jd.title: Principal RF Engineer — 5G mmWave
jd.style_note: Startup-technical: Open RAN disruptor, specific technology stack, mission-driven

requirements.text: 10+ years of RF engineering experience in cellular networks (LTE/5G)
Deep expertise in 5G NR mmWave (FR2) radio planning, including beamforming and beam management
Experience with O-RAN architecture and open fronthaul interfaces (7.2x split)
Proficiency in RF planning tools: Atoll, ASSET, or Planet
Experience with drive test analysis tools (TEMS Investigation, Nemo Outdoor) and post-processing (Actix Analyzer, XCAL)
Knowledge of 3GPP Release 15-17 specifications for NR
Experience with massive MIMO antenna systems (64T64R or higher)
Experience with network densification strategies for urban mmWave deployment
Familiarity with Rakuten Symphony's Symworld platform or equivalent cloud-native RAN
Japanese language proficiency (JLPT N2 or higher)

responsibilities: Lead RF design and optimization for Rakuten Mobile's 5G mmWave network expansion across Tokyo metropolitan area
Design beamforming strategies and beam management algorithms for high-density urban environments
Collaborate with O-RAN software teams on RIC (RAN Intelligent Controller) integration for automated optimization
Conduct interference analysis and coexistence studies for mmWave/sub-6GHz dual-connectivity scenarios
Mentor team of 4 RF engineers on mmWave-specific design challenges

expected_output.summary: Senior RF Engineer with 12 years of experience in cellular network design and optimization at Ericsson. Led 5G NR deployment projects across 3 markets (Japan, South Korea, Australia). Deep expertise in sub-6GHz massive MIMO (64T64R) and LTE-Advanced optimization. Proficient in Atoll, TEMS Investigation, and Actix Analyzer. 3GPP RAN4 contributor. Seeking to transition from vendor-side to operator/platform-side at an O-RAN innovator.

experience.title: Senior RF Engineer — 5G Deployment
bullets: Led RF planning and optimization for NTT Docomo's 5G NR sub-6GHz rollout across 8 prefectures (3,200+ sites)
Designed massive MIMO beamforming configurations (64T64R) for urban macro and small cell deployments
Conducted drive test campaigns using TEMS Investigation and post-processed data in Actix Analyzer for KPI benchmarking
Achieved 15% throughput improvement through SSB beam optimization and CSI-RS configuration tuning
Contributed to 3GPP RAN4 working group on NR performance requirements (Release 16-17)

experience.title: RF Optimization Engineer
bullets: Optimized SK Telecom's LTE-Advanced and early 5G trial networks using Atoll for RF planning
Performed interference analysis for 3.5GHz TDD-LTE and 28GHz mmWave trial sites in Seoul
Supported Korea's first commercial 5G launch (April 2019) with RF acceptance testing across 2,100 sites
Managed RF performance KPIs (RSRP, SINR, throughput) for cluster optimization across 5 districts

experience.title: RF Engineer
bullets: Performed RF planning for Telstra's 4G/LTE network using Atoll and MapInfo
Conducted drive tests with Nemo Outdoor and produced coverage analysis reports
Supported antenna selection and tilt optimization for regional and suburban macro sites

education: MSc Telecommunications Engineering — University of Melbourne (2011-2013)
BEng Electrical Engineering — University of Sydney (2007-2011)

jd_requirements: 5G NR mmWave FR2 beamforming beam management
Atoll ASSET Planet RF planning tools
TEMS Investigation Nemo Outdoor Actix Analyzer XCAL drive test
deliberate_flaws: No mmWave (FR2) hands-on experience — all sub-6GHz and LTE (28GHz was trial only in Korea)
No O-RAN experience — entire career at Ericsson (proprietary RAN vendor)
JLPT N3 not N2 — below preferred language threshold
No experience with ASSET or Planet RF tools (only Atoll)
No cloud-native RAN or RIC experience (vendor-side, not platform-side)
No network densification strategy design (executed plans, didn't design strategies)
Vendor-to-operator transition — different KPI ownership and commercial pressure
